hooks.command: export PATH="/Users/cristiancirje/.cargo/bin:$PATH" && jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -qE '/plugin/(src/.*\.rs|Cargo\.toml)$' && cd /Users/cristiancirje/Desktop/Dev/studio-ai/plugin && cargo build --release 2>&1 | tail -2 && cp target/release/libstudio_ai_plugin.dylib "/Library/Audio/Plug-Ins/VST3/Studio AI.vst3/Contents/MacOS/studio-ai" && echo '{"systemMessage":"Plugin built and deployed to VST3 bundle"}'; }

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -qE '/bridge/fl_studio/device_studio_ai\.py$' && cp "$f" "$HOME/Documents/Image-Line/FL Studio/Settings/Hardware/Studio AI/device_studio_ai.py" && echo '{"systemMessage":"FL Studio script deployed to Hardware folder"}'; }
